text: & Summary @ msancanis @ s * Bucket names are globally unique * 3 - 63 characters, all lower case, no underscores e Start with a lowercase letter or a number e Can't be IP formatted e.g. 1.1.1.1 ¢ Buckets - 100 soft limit, 1000 hard per account Unlimited objects in bucket, 0 bytes to 5TB ¢ Key = Name, Value = Data
